title: What are AI agents?
summary: Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates how to build autonomous multi-agent systems using the Google Agent Development Kit. The video covers ReAct framework theory, three agent patterns (sequential, reactive, planning), and includes a practical Python tutorial on building a self-correcting blog writing agent with validation and auto-retry capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through building autonomous multi-agent systems with the Google Agent Development Kit. It explains the ReAct framework and contrasts three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning. The practical portion is a Python tutorial that constructs a self-correcting blog writing agent, using validation and auto-retry so the agent revises its own output when checks fail. Takeaways include how SequentialAgent structures multi-step workflows and how auto-correction loops close the gap between generated and validated results.
